context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of spec-20260628-medical-analysis: a PURE, INJECTABLE multi-lens judge loop that gates candidate medical recommendations through four lenses (evidence-grader, contraindication-checker with VETO, conservative-clinician, optimization-lens), reconciles by strict majority with an absolute contraindication veto, regenerates on rejection up to a bounded number of rounds, and FAILS CLOSED (no recommendation surfaced, dissent captured) when consensus is not reached. The red-flag short-circuit runs first and bypasses generation entirely. NO real LLM/FactStore/fs/network — everything is injected.

completedSprints.title: Proactive trend Findings + vault writer + dashboard + review pass
completedSprints.summary: Added src/medical/analysis/{finding,finding-writer,trends,review-pass}.ts. MedicalFinding shape (id,domain,title,kind action|watch|risk|question,urgency 1-5,severity 1-5,evidence[],surfacedAt,tags[],status), deterministic findingId (SHA-256 of domain|biomarker|ruleKey, excludes now), serializeFindingToMarkdown reuses src/vault/frontmatter.ts. Commit 307e5e7. NOTE: the MedicalFinding type + serializer from sprint 1 are the canonical in-repo finding shape sprint 3 will reuse to EMIT; sprint 2 only produces verdicts/outcomes, it does NOT emit findings.

notes: Full contract (sc-2-1..sc-2-7, nonGoals, stopConditions, assumptions, estimatedFiles) is in .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-2.json. Read the Sprint Briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-2-briefing.md FIRST. CRITICAL: invert fleet fail-open to FAIL-CLOSED (mirror grounding-critic.ts:206, NOT critic-deep.ts:206). Contraindication veto is absolute — never overridable by vote majority. Red-flag fires FIRST (generateCandidate spy must never be called). Loop never throws; bounded by MEDICAL_PANEL_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS.
